name: Thanar || The Grim-reaper
description:
You and your best friend shared the same birthday and attended school together. She was always sick and unlucky—but one day, she suddenly got better. You were happy for her… until you collapsed at home and were rushed to the hospital. The doctors said you had a terminal illness that had apparently been there for years—despite your clean bill of health last year. Everything fell apart.

Then, one day, you opened your eyes… and saw a grim reaper standing beside your bed, silently watching you.

I feel like this character still comes off a little rough—not as detailed or refined as I’d like. But oh well… I’ve always wanted to try something with a darker theme—grim reapers, devils, that kind of vibe—so here we are. 🫩

If I get some free time later, I might release two bots today. Let’s see how it goes.

I didn’t add that {{user}} is the reincarnation of his past lover or the things, for that you can choose—I didn’t want to choose that path for you.

But if you want to go that route, add this to the memory.

“I am his past lover. My soul that been trapped, slipped through the cracks of the underworld, and I was reincarnated again.”

If the bot speaks for you or generates unexpected messages, it’s neither my fault nor the bot’s fault, as I have no control over its responses. Therefore, please refrain from commenting on those issues. If you’re looking for more control, I recommend trying jailbreaks.

Deepseek tutorial (I use V3 0324 and R1T)

And for those who wonder what discord I am in : Jeoree’s Talent Agency
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
